title: Concurrent read-write
description: Given readers and writers operating simultaneously, readers should never see partially-written records and writers should never corrupt the index for concurrent readers. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_read_write.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: moved to concurrent read-write story and reviewing feature spec. Next: implement Rust/Python steps for concurrent_read_write.feature and wire any concurrency helpers. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: added concurrent read-write steps for Rust+Python with writer/reader loops and validation; cargo test --test cucumber passed; behave concurrent_read_write.feature passed. Next: close story and commit/push changes. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: closed (kbs does not accept 'done'). Done: implemented concurrent_read_write steps in Rust+Python with reader/writer loops and GSI consistency checks. Tests: cargo test --test cucumber passed; behave features/concurrency/concurrent_read_write.feature passed.
